dispatch_policy: Do not create image-generation threads until the user approves the episode 01 asset manifest, designs, prompts, and thread plan.
history_policy: Final approved images write to exact output_paths; retained alternatives go to sibling history/ with .v001 suffixes; no version folders.

batches.thread_prompt:
After user approval, generate B01_E01_CHARACTERS assets only from approved prompt records. Write one final confirmed image per exact output path. Retained non-final candidates must be archived in sibling history/ with .v001, .v002 suffixes. Do not create version folders. Return final_files, history_files, blocked_items, and QC notes. This is an image generation thread batch: use only the approved art-image prompt records, keep every final confirmed image at the exact canonical output path, and archive any retained alternate or rejected image in sibling history/ files with .v001, .v002 filename suffixes.

Output format contract: follow each prompt record's literal output_format object. File format must be PNG. Asset card batches require neutral plain or board backgrounds, no alpha transparency, required multi-view/detail/scale-reference layout, and must not be treated as final video frames. Reference-frame and shot-override batches require 16:9 video_frame backgrounds, alpha forbidden, and clearly separated foreground, midground, and background with camera distance, camera angle, screen direction, lighting, weather/time, and action state.
batches.dependency_reason: Batch depends on approved episode style references and any listed series master assets.

output_format_contract.enforcement: Each prompt record output_format is binding. Asset cards are not final video frames. Reference frames and shot overrides must use video_frame background, alpha forbidden, and visibly separated foreground/midground/background.

warnings: Primary B04 batch thread stalled after style-board generation; coordinator recovered outputs and split F005/F006 into single-asset threads.
F006 first single-asset thread stalled without output; retry thread completed canonical file.
Built-in generator returned sub-target dimensions for F001/F005; accepted visual candidates were normalized locally to the required output_format dimensions.
